arts.ttl: “Special connection” | Why Hammers fans booing Declan Rice should stop
arts.sum: West Ham fans booing Declan Rice after he continues to be nothing but respectful towards the club is baffling. Every single West Ham fan would have much preferred Declan Rice to sign for someone like Manchester City over Arsenal. Not only are they one of our London rivals, but they also have one of the... arts.ttl: “Disappointing day” | West Ham keeper unhappy with team performance and personal blunder vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Lukasz Fabianski held no punches when speaking on West Ham’s 5-2 thrashing against Arsenal. After an immense win against Newcastle, West Ham were brought back down to reality with a horrid display against London rivals Arsenal. Apart from a five minute spell in which they scored their two goals, the Hammers were simply not in... arts.ttl: Arsenal on cusp of English top-flight goal record after West Ham victory
arts.sum: Arsenal could break an English top-flight goal record before the end of 2024.
